title: Ascendency Path of War
atAGlance: A dominance-focused path for characters who turn positioning and pressure into decisive battlefield swings.
sageNotes: War bearers turn position into momentum with ruthless clarity, seizing ground so others can stand. Outsiders call them butchers, yet the finest are line-holders who break enemy will at decisive instants. In breach doctrine, a War core is what orders sound like when they become action.
gameInformation: Best for frontliners and tactical controllers. Core unlock examples: Marked Strike, Godstep Charge, Banner of Ruin, and Thronebreaker Edict. Limit bonus damage riders to once per turn to preserve class balance.
